meaning: n.靠近路缘的人行道部分,路边
examples: You position yourself so the client is seated curbside.
You're entering a cab with an important guest. You position yourself so the guest is seated curbside.
To be sure, setting the price and use of curbside space is an essentially public function.
Use curbside check-in and print your boarding passes before you go to the airport.
And Bloomberg noted that New Yorkers have long had to work around parked cars and other curbside obstacles.
